title: Zesty Content Model
description: A Zesty.io content model defines the structure and schema for content items within an instance, including fields and their types.

ZUID.description: The Zesty Universal Identifier for the content model.

name.description: The name of the content model.

label.description: The display label for the content model.

type.description: The type of the content model.

description.description: A description of the content model.

parentZUID.description: The parent content model ZUID for nested models.

listed.description: Whether the model appears in navigation.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the content model was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the content model was last updated.
